title: node:test, Supertest, Contracts, Properties, Fuzzing, and Fault Injection · Inference Brief: Supertest Handler Integration
summary: Tests call live dependencies, assert only status 200, share mutable state, never vary malformed inputs, and mistake mocks or coverage for behavioral proof. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsts supertest handler integration increment in layered deterministic server verification matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Exercise Express handlers with Supertest using exact methods, paths, fields, bodies, identity, effects, errors, and cleanup without unnecessary public listeners.
Use node:test suites, subtests, assertions, fixtures, hooks, concurrency, timers, and cleanup to prove domain decisions independently of Express.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Predict Supertest Handler Integration · Theory Supertest Handler Integration
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory team handles case 7688 in a administrative API crossing two identity and network trust zones. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to gate release on layered domain, handler, fuzz, and resource-lifecycle evidence; prove cleanup before the service deadline expires; then reuse an idempotency key with different input and reject the fingerprint mismatch. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.
